scripts.editor:contracts:check: UV_CACHE_DIR=${TMPDIR:-/tmp}/ftd-editor-uv-cache uv run python scripts/generate_contracts.py --check && UV_CACHE_DIR=${TMPDIR:-/tmp}/ftd-editor-uv-cache uv run python tests/fixtures/write_contract_fixtures.py --output tests/fixtures/pure-ftd-parity.json --check
scripts.editor:schema:check: UV_CACHE_DIR=${TMPDIR:-/tmp}/ftd-editor-uv-cache uv run python scripts/generate_level_schema.py --check && UV_CACHE_DIR=${TMPDIR:-/tmp}/ftd-editor-uv-cache uv run python scripts/verify_public_levels.py
scripts.editor:backend:test: UV_CACHE_DIR=${TMPDIR:-/tmp}/ftd-editor-uv-cache uv run pytest tests -m 'not stress and not legacy_census and not paid'
scripts.editor:publishing:test: UV_CACHE_DIR=${TMPDIR:-/tmp}/ftd-editor-uv-cache uv run pytest tests/contracts/test_public_schema.py tests/contracts/test_catalog_sequence.py tests/contracts/test_publishing.py tests/contracts/test_publish_reconciliation.py tests/contracts/test_publishing_api.py
scripts.editor:ci: npm run editor:contracts:check && npm run editor:schema:check && npm run editor:backend:test && npm run build
scripts.editor:verify: npm run editor:contracts:check && npm run editor:schema:check && npm run editor:backend:test && npm run typecheck && npm run test:unit && npm run lint && npm run build
